titleStmt.title: SII 20.186: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 186. (B.K. No. 44 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Svāmiliṅga.

summary.p: This record in Nāgari characters and Kannaḍa language is dated Śaka 1127, Raktākshi Ās11vija, s11u. Pūrṇimā, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1204, October 10, Sunday, taking the Śaka year to be current. There was a lunar eclipse on that day.

The inscription states that the king renewed the grant of certain villages for the worship and offerings of the god Svayaṁbhu Sōmanātha at Kaḍalēvāḍa, in the name and for the merit of Chilādēvi, probably the queen of Siṅghaṇa. The earlier grant seems to be the same as the one referred to in the latter part of the inscription. It records a gift for the benefit of the same temple, by Rāyamurāri Jammugidēva, Bijjaladēva and others. It appears that this grant was discontinued and was renewed during the time of Siṅghaṇadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Oṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdālaṁkāra dvārāvatīpuradharā dhīśvara
nārāyaṇavaṁśāvatāra śriṁgāraśāra madanavatāra yādavakulakamalamārtaṁḍa darppiṣṭarāyaśārabhabheruṁḍa saṁgrāmarāma U
bhayabalapratijñāparaśurāma satyadharmapratipannakarṇa parasainyabalaghanasauparṇa Ārādhyapādapaṁkaja bhramara mahābalarāya
sādhāra mālavasainyaraṇagharaṭṭa coladiśāpaṭṭa ti nanidhānadhūmaketu kaliṁgasarvvāṁgaśceṁdira layakā
laketu magadhanepālapāriyātrādilavakā�mekāṁgavīra kāvatāra terlagarāyanirmmūlaṁ
navainateya satyarādheya digudiśārāyagajakolāhala vairibalahālāhala śrī sāraṁgapāṇidevadivya śrīpā
dārādhakaṁ parabalasādhakaṁ nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ rāyanārāyāṇa pratāpacakravarti siṁgaṇadevarasaru nāryacā
kaduradalu sukhasaṁkathāvinodadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire natprastāvadolu Agastyamahāriṣiyā strīmadakṣi
ṇavāraṇāsi kaḍalevāḍadaṁ sri svayaṁbhusomanāthadevara stānadalli yā nāḍinalli jasavaṁta nāyākanā stānake dosava
māḍuttaviralā sthānadācārya sātimayyaṁgalu valada stāpisutiralu Ātanadhikāravaṁ kaladākṣepisi cīlādedhi
gakṣayaphalavāgi sakavarṣada 1127 neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada Āsija sudha puṇami Ādityavāra vyatipāta somagraThese numerals are in Kannada Characters.
haṇadaṁdu somanāthadevarālkeya puraṁ sahita nālaku halligalolagāgi tama svahastadiṁ punardattiyā [gi Ā] devaraṁgabhogakaṁ khaṁ
ḍasphuṭitajīrṇṇodhārakkaṁ brāhmaṇara tapodhanarāhāradānakaṁ cīlādeviyara hesaralu naḍavaṁtāgi Ācārya sātimayyaṁga
la pādaprākṣālana māḍi sarvanamaśyavāgi dhārāpūrvaka māḍi koṭṭaru . Adhikārigaḷāruṁ huguvaṁdu devarige kāṇikeyaṁ ko
ṭu huguvadu maṁgalamahā strī © © svasti samastaprasastisahita kalacuryavaṁśodbhava rāyamurāri jaṁmugideva
rasarū rāja vijaladevaru manya samastasaṁtatigalu sahitavāgi purasahita devarigālva nālku halliyaluṁ tāvu koṁba kāṇike
saṁtavaṇamaṁ kaḍalevāḍada srīsvayaṁbhusomanāthadevarige gaṁdhadhūpanivedya naḍavaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru .
madvaṁśajā paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapetamanasā bhuvi bhāvi bhupā te pālayaṁtu mama dharṁmamidaṁ samastaṁ teṣāṁ
mayā viracitoṁjalireṣa mūrdhni © ©
Digital edition of SII 20.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
